message:
Render Markdown code upright

Override the GitHub Neovim theme's raw Markdown highlights so inline code and code blocks no longer inherit italic styling.

Assisted-by: ChatGPT (pi)

files.patch:
@@ -5,12 +5,42 @@ return {
   lazy = false,
   priority = 1000,
   config = function()
+    local function disable_markdown_code_italics()
+      for _, group in ipairs({
+        '@markup.raw',
+        '@markup.raw.markdown',
+        '@markup.raw.markdown_inline',
+        '@markup.raw.block',
+        '@markup.raw.block.markdown',
+      }) do
+        local hl = vim.api.nvim_get_hl(0, { name = group, link = false })
+        hl.italic = false
+        vim.api.nvim_set_hl(0, group, hl)
+      end
+    end
+
     require('github-theme').setup({
       options = {
         transparent = true,
       },
+      groups = {
+        all = {
+          ['@markup.raw'] = { style = 'NONE' },
+          ['@markup.raw.markdown'] = { style = 'NONE' },
+          ['@markup.raw.markdown_inline'] = { style = 'NONE' },
+          ['@markup.raw.block'] = { style = 'NONE' },
+          ['@markup.raw.block.markdown'] = { style = 'NONE' },
+        },
+      },
+    })
+
+    vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd('ColorScheme', {
+      group = vim.api.nvim_create_augroup('dotfiles-github-theme', { clear = true }),
+      pattern = 'github_*',
+      callback = disable_markdown_code_italics,
     })
-    -- vim.cmd 'highlight WinSeparator NONE'
+
     vim.cmd.colorscheme 'github_light'
-  end
+    disable_markdown_code_italics()
+  end,
 }
